headline: Best documentary picks on Netflix right now: 6 titles worth starting first
meta_description: Need the best documentary picks on Netflix? These are the titles worth starting first if you want something better than random browsing.
subtitle: Featuring Black Warrant, Surviving Black Hawk Down, and The Greatest Rivalry India vs Pakistan — plus more documentary picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best documentary picks on Netflix right now: 6 titles worth starting first
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring Black Warrant, Surviving Black Hawk Down, and The Greatest Rivalry India vs Pakistan — plus more documentary picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: Black Warrant
selected_titles.description: A new jailer at Tihar Prison faces corruption and injustice grappling with a choice preserve the system or fight for reform in this tense, gritty drama.

selected_titles.title: Surviving Black Hawk Down
selected_titles.description: American forces on the defensive Mogadishu 93 through raw real voices.

selected_titles.title: The Greatest Rivalry India vs Pakistan
selected_titles.description: Cricket ultimate showdown The Greatest Rivalry: India vs Pakistan on #Netflix relives epic battles. A must-watch doc for sports fans.

selected_titles.title: Inside the mind of a CAT
selected_titles.description: Learn about the relationship between humans and Cats in this cute documentary.

selected_titles.title: my octopus teacher
selected_titles.description: A filmmaker forges an unusual friendship with an octopus living in a South African kelp forest, learning as the animal shares the mysteries of her world.

selected_titles.title: Nayanthara
selected_titles.description: It really gives you a glimpse into the life of the incredible Nayanthara. If you need some motivation or just love a good cinematic story, give this documentary a watch.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
